name: Free Online Security Services
description: Defensive-only curated tree generated automatically from the D3fD3c0y/Free-online-security-services repository. Some explicitly offensive or malware-download categories from the source are intentionally excluded.

children.name: Shodan Search modifiers
children.description: There are a set of special terms that you can use to refine your search results.

children.name: VirusTotal Search modifiers
children.description: There are a set of special terms that you can use to refine your search results.

children.name: CyberChief
children.description: UK GCHQ's free online tool to convert, parse or carry out well over 100 different operations.

children.name: UnCoder
children.description: online translator for SIEM saved searches, filters, queries, API requests, correlation and Sigma rules to help SOC Analysts, Threat Hunters and SIEM Engineers.

children.name: DISARM Red Framework
children.description: The DISARM Red Framework provides a common language for documenting influence operations. When different organisations describe what they're seeing in the same terms, they can share intelligence, and gain a better understanding of actors' manipulative behaviours.

children.name: Mitre Att&ck Enterprise Matrix
children.description: The tactics and techniques representing the MITRE ATT&CK® Matrix for Enterprise.

children.name: MITRE ATTACK Flow
children.description: With Attack Flow, you will capture the entire attack and communicate what matters

children.name: MITRE ATTACK Flow Builder
children.description: Interactive interface of the MITRE ATTACK Flow

children.name: Mitre Att&ck Navigator
children.description: Interactive interface of the MITRE ATT&CK Framework which can be use as graphical reference for understanding/following invetsigation.

children.name: Mitre CAPEC
children.description: CAPEC™ provide a comprehensive dictionary of known patterns of attack employed by adversaries to exploit known weaknesses in cyber-enabled capabilities.

children.name: Mitre CREF Navigator
children.description: The CREF Navigator™ was developed as a web based relational tool distilling the complex concepts and relationships from NIST SP 800-160 Volume 2 (Rev 1) into useful cyber resiliency terms, tables, and relationship visualizations enabling architectural and engineering analysis.

children.name: Mitre CVE
children.description: The mission of the CVE® Program is to identify, define, and catalog publicly disclosed cybersecurity vulnerabilities.

children.name: Mitre CWE
children.description: Common Weakness Enumeration (CWE™) is a community-developed list of common software and hardware weaknesses. A “weakness” is a condition in a software, firmware, hardware, or service component that, under certain circumstances, could contribute to the introduction of vulnerabilities.

children.name: Mitre DEFEND
children.description: A framework in which we encode a countermeasure knowledge base, but more specifically, a knowledge graph.

children.name: Mitre EMB3D
children.description: The EMB3D Threat Model provides a cultivated knowledge base of cyber threats to embedded devices, providing a common understanding of these threats with security mechanisms to mitigate them.

children.name: OSWAP BLADE
children.description: The OWASP Business Logic Attack Definition (BLADE) Framework, is an open-source knowledge-base created to help cybersecurity professionals identify the phases, tactics and techniques used by adversaries to exploit weaknesses in the business logic of web facing systems (websites and APIs)

children.name: C2IntelFeed
children.description: Free and Open Source Threat Intelligence Feeds dedicated to Cobalt Strike C2, Empire C2 and PoshC2.

children.name: Covert Threat Intelligence Feed list
children.description: Free and Open Source Threat Intelligence Feeds.

children.name: FireHOL IPList
children.description: Analyse all available security IP Feeds, mainly related to on-line attacks, on-line service abuse, malwares, botnets, command and control servers and other cybercrime activities.

children.name: Threat Feeds
children.description: Free and open-source threat intelligence feeds.

children.name: Threat-intel.xyz
children.description: Free and Open Source Threat Intelligence Feeds.

children.name: AnyRun
children.description: Interactive online sandbox. Also perform sample download from URL.

children.name: GateWatcher
children.description: This site is a resource for security professionals and enthusiasts. Gatewatcher Intelligence is a non-commercial community project. Our list can be used for free by anyone. Feel free to use it.

children.name: Hybrid-Analysis
children.description: CrowdStrike's public sandbox. Also perform sample download from URL. Free account required to download samples.

children.name: IRIS-H Digital Forensics
children.description: IRIS-H is an online digital forensics tool that performs automated static analysis of files stored in a directory-based or strictly structured formats. The tool produces two types of data views allowing for thorough digital forensics examination. Support Microsoft Office Documents, .lnk and RTF files.

children.name: InQuest Labs
children.description: Capable of recursively decompressing, decoding, deobfuscating, decompiling, deciphering, and more. We aim to automate and scale the reverse engineering skill-set of a typical SOC analyst.

children.name: Intezer Analyze Community Edition
children.description: Intezer's malware analysis and classification of malwares using code DNA mapping.

children.name: Joe Sandbox Cloud Community Edition
children.description: Joe Security's sandbox for Windows, Android, MacOS and IOS for suspicious activities. Also perform sample download from URL.

children.name: MalwareConfig
children.description: Extract config information from RATs.

children.name: Manalyzer
children.description: Manalyzer is a free service which performs static analysis on PE executables to detect undesirable behavior.

children.name: OPSWAT Metadefender
children.description: OPSWAT's deep endpoint forensic analysis for malware using several methods.

children.name: Pikker
children.description: Free public instance of Cuckoo sandbox

children.name: Polyswarm
children.description: Crowdsourced Malware Analysis for new and emerging threats.

children.name: Quicksand.io
children.description: Office document malware analysis.

children.name: Sandblast
children.description: Check Point's public version of Threat Emulation.

children.name: SecondWrite
children.description: SecondWrite brings deep learning and forced code-execution to the battle against advanced malware. Our dynamic analysis malware detector uses patented technology to find, execute and characterize hidden code paths that other malware detectors miss.

children.name: Talos File Reputation
children.description: The Cisco Talos Intelligence Group maintains a reputation disposition on billions of files. This reputation system is fed into the AMP, FirePower, ClamAV, and Open-Source Snort product lines.

children.name: Triage
children.description: Hatching Triage is our state-of-the-art malware analysis sandbox designed for cross-platform support (Windows, Android, Linux, and macOS), high-volume malware analysis capabilities, and malware configuration extraction for dozens of malware families.

children.name: Valkyrie Comodo
children.description: File verdict system. Different from traditional signature based malware detection techniques Valkyrie conducts several analysis using run-time behavior and hundreds of features from a file and based on analysis results can warn users against malware undetected by classic Anti-Virus products.

children.name: VirusTotal
children.description: Google's public platform that compare samples analysis from multiple AV vendors and provide basic Threat Intelligence and metadata related to the samples. Note that the analysis are base on signature detection for most AV vendors.

children.name: PacketTotal
children.description: Simple, free, high-quality PCAP analysis.

children.name: UserAgentString
children.description: List over 100 user agent string and provide tool to automatically explain the information found in the User agent string.

children.name: Group-IB  Malware Detonation Reports
children.description: Group-IB's Malware Detonation Platform does much more than merely identify good and bad files. It reveals how attacks unfold in real time and pinpoints which processes are executed, which files are created or modified, and what network connections are established.

children.description: Explore an extensive collection of the most popular malware families, including detailed descriptions, tactics, and insights into their connections with threat actors.

children.description: Our goal for developing the threat matrix for DevOps is to build a comprehensive knowledgebase that defenders can use to keep track of and build defenses against relevant attack techniques.

children.name: Microsoft Threat Matrix for Kubernetes

children.name: Microsoft Threat Matrix for Storage Services
children.description: The purpose of the threat matrix for storage services is to conceptualize the known tactics, techniques, and procedures (TTP) that adversaries may use against this type accounts.

children.name: OWASP Threat and Safeguard Matrix (TaSM)
children.description: The Threat and Safeguard Matrix (TaSM) is an action-oriented view to safeguard and enable the business created by CISO Tradecraft.

children.name: Space Attack Research and Tactic Analysis (SPARTA) matrix
